hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -qE 'requirements.*\.txt$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"You are editing a requirements file. Per AGENTS.md Dependency Version Research: verify each dependency against its current latest (gh release list or PyPI). Pin NEW deps to the latest version unless the user specified one. NEVER auto-bump an existing dep - if one is behind, surface it and ASK first. Report any outdated dep (it may be vulnerable)."}}' || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | grep -qE 'src/webcam_aggregator/.*\.py$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You edited a webcam_aggregator source module. Does this need a new or updated test? Tests live in tests/ as *_test.py (the name-tests-test hook rejects test_*.py), the suite is fully offline (inject fakes, real sockets on port 0 - no network), and a coverage floor gates the commit. Add or adjust the matching *_test.py now."}}' || true
